text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 30 

HH_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Home Health Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments in the home health (HH) setting for a given year. The total 
Medicare payments for HH are calculated as the sum of CLM_PMT_AMT for all HH claims where the 
CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HH_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived)
